stages.seed_desc: Early-stage with a soft launch / MVP, operating for less than 1 year.
stages.series_a_desc: Operating and needs growth, operating for less than 2 years.
stages.series_b_desc: Clear growth stage, operating for 2–4 years.
stages.series_c_desc: Established and successful, operating for 4+ years.
stages.series_d_desc: Very advanced stage, preparing for IPO or acquisition.

health.Very Strong_desc: Excellent financial performance, strong cash position, clear growth, and obligations under control.
health.Strong_desc: Strong and highly stable performance, good profitability, and solid ability to cover expenses and obligations.
health.Stable_desc: Balanced financial state; revenue covers operations comfortably with no major stress indicators.
health.Moderate_desc: Acceptable but fluctuating performance; stronger and weaker periods, needs better cost or sales control.
health.Needs Improvement_desc: Noticeable weakness in a key area (sales, margins, or liquidity) and requires a short-term improvement plan.
health.Weak_desc: Significant financial pressure; difficulty covering expenses or obligations consistently, needs urgent fixes.
health.Critical_desc: Severe indicators such as major deficit, distressed debt, or continuous cash burn; may require restructuring or emergency funding.
health.Not Disclosed_desc: Financial information is not shared or insufficient data was provided for evaluation.
health.Unknown_desc: Not enough reliable data to determine the status accurately.

aboutPage.title: Who We Are
aboutPage.intro: Business & Investments is a Kuwaiti platform that connects investors with opportunity owners securely and reliably, with the highest level of privacy and anonymity.

sections.title: Why Us?
sections.body: We are not just an advertising site, but a digital intermediary that ensures the quality of offers through careful administrative review and protection of all parties' data.

sections.title: How the Platform Works?
sections.body: Projects are displayed with preliminary data. To unlock full details, the investor purchases the project booklet. When serious, meetings are coordinated through management.

sections.title: Privacy & Anonymity Policy
sections.body: Members appear only by ID numbers in the early stages. Identity is not revealed except when necessary and with the parties' consent.

sections.title: Commission
sections.body: A success commission of 2.5% is applied to the total deal value upon successful completion.
